why_it_matters: The note states 'no medications' and completed reconciliation as such, but the patient regularly uses OTC naproxen, an NSAID with GI/renal/cardiac risks relevant to an accurate medication list.
Documenting the advice to continue occasional naproxen with food completes the OA management plan and reinforces safe NSAID use.
Positive SDOH findings (stable housing, safe home, insurance) document the completed social needs assessment but are largely reassuring and non-actionable for this visit.
